title: Digital Chamber sues Illinois officials over new state 0.2% crypto tax
summary: Digital Chamber sues Illinois officials over new state 0.2% crypto tax
briefing: The group alleged that the tax signed into law in June “discriminates against people who transact in digital assets“ and should be blocked from implementation and enforcement.

title: BitGo, OTC Markets plan tokenized securities access for broker-dealers
summary: BitGo, OTC Markets plan tokenized securities access for broker-dealers
briefing: The proposed alliance would enable more than 150 broker-dealers to trade and settle digital asset securities through OTC Link ATS using BitGo’s custody infrastructure.

title: Bitcoin price avoids major Iran jitters as S&P 500 ‘short squeeze’ on horizon
summary: Bitcoin price avoids major Iran jitters as S&P 500 ‘short squeeze’ on horizon
briefing: Bitcoin and US stocks stayed strong in the face of US-Iran escalation as analysis predicted BTC price action outperforming equities later.

title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
summary: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
briefing: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
summary: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
briefing: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow
summary: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow
briefing: Binance set multimonth records for net BTC outflows on Tuesday, adding to an emerging trend of positive inflows to the US spot Bitcoin ETFs.

title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
summary: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
briefing: A security vulnerability in the Zilliqa Ledger app is enabling attackers to reconstruct private keys using publicly available onchain data.

title: Hugging Face CEO Thanks Chinese AI for Saving the Day After OpenAI Hack
summary: Hugging Face CEO Thanks Chinese AI for Saving the Day After OpenAI Hack
briefing: When American commercial AI refused to help investigate the breach, Hugging Face ran Chinese model GLM 5.2 locally. Its CEO now says there's an important lesson in this.

title: US Seizes More Than $25M in Crypto Tied to Investment and Romance Scams
summary: US Seizes More Than $25M in Crypto Tied to Investment and Romance Scams
briefing: Prosecutors filed five forfeiture cases as Secret Service agents traced funds from thousands of victims to launderers in Southeast Asia.

title: Centralized Elements 'Frequently Persist' in DeFi and Should Be Regulated: FATF
summary: Centralized Elements 'Frequently Persist' in DeFi and Should Be Regulated: FATF
briefing: Nearly every country has yet to apply the rules, the watchdog said, warning of outright bans for platforms that don’t comply.

title: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs
summary: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs
briefing: TRM Labs says the UK-sanctioned exchange has rotated hot wallets across blockchains, leaving address-list screening struggling to keep pace.

title: Morning Minute: OpenAI Model Escapes Containment, Hacks Hugging Face
summary: Morning Minute: OpenAI Model Escapes Containment, Hacks Hugging Face
briefing: Plus, the BTC ETFs stay green. The Clarity Act hits a wall over who enforces the ethics rules. And Jack Mallers walks away from XXI Capital.

title: Jack Dorsey's Block Launches Buzz, a Nostr-Based Slack and GitHub Rival for AI Agents
summary: Jack Dorsey's Block Launches Buzz, a Nostr-Based Slack and GitHub Rival for AI Agents
briefing: The free, open source workspace runs on Nostr, gives AI agents their own cryptographic identities, and challenges Slack and GitHub.

title: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
summary: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
briefing: The UK Bitcoin treasury company raised $218 million less than a year ago. Now it's returning whatever is left.

title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
summary: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
briefing: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.
